programmes.show_description: Surthrive. An independent mother of three, plus a jungle savvy Green Beret, take on the remote wetlands of Guyana. But will they be up to the task? S2, Ep7
Easier Said Than Done. A nurturing mother, and an independent adventurer try to survive in the rainforests of Nicaragua. Can they conquer two weeks Naked and Afraid? S2, Ep8

Texas Tavern Sign. The team visits a favourite local restaurant to salvage signage. Plus, they learn the history of the local restaurant over burgers and bowls of chili. S6, Ep10
St. Agatha's Catholic Church. The crew travels to Ellwood City to reclaim pieces of St. Agatha's Catholic Church. In the bitter cold, they salvage stained glass and spiral ducting. S6, Ep11
Into The Red. Co-captains Jake and Johnathan try to join forces with rival Keith Colburn. Junior risks crossing into enemy waters and Wild Bill seeks work in Russia. S16, Ep7
Mayday Mayday. The Coast Guard responds to a Mayday call, as captains and crew brace a brutal winter storm. Sig and Monte track an Opilio hoard. S16, Ep8
Cold War Heating Up. As the crab biomass migrates across the Russian line, Josh and Casey dump 175 pots on the border. Meanwhile, Jake's new deckhand suffers an injury. S16, Ep9
The Lucky Day. Sweltering temperatures and a waterlogged mine threaten to unravel The Digi Diggers' season-long dream. The Cheals' starter motor fails on their wash plant. S6, Ep20
New Terra. The Bushmen put their lives on the line in the most dangerous mine they have ever worked. Plus, the Cheal's first dig of the season grinds to a halt. S7, Ep1
Between A Rod And A Hard Place. A rookie miner gets trapped down a mine shaft. A dust storm forces the Blacklights to reluctantly return to the failed Land of Promise money pit. S7, Ep2
Huge floods and a mini tornado hit the Gemfields. Max fights his way to his mining lease, but did the flooding fill or destroy his dam? Todd and Brianna get bad news. S1, Ep5
It's almost the end of the mining season. Water in the dam means one last chance for sapphires for Max and Glenn. It's terror in the tunnels for Todd and Brianna. S1, Ep6
New Opportunities. Old Timer, Ray, and his best mate Paul set foot on a new claim for the first time. The Apprentices begin connecting two mine shafts via an underground drive. S2, Ep1
After a frustrating day, the Ferals hit a gold hot streak. An injury rocks the Gold Timers, while Shane and Russell struggle with their homemade sluice. S6, Ep5
Prospectors Jacqui and Andrew uncover gold in Queensland. The Poseidon Crew get some exciting news, while the Dust Devils spend big on new equipment. S6, Ep6
The Gold Timers fight back against gold thieves. Machinery problems continue to plague the Dust Devils, while Marcus is panicked when Linden goes missing. S6, Ep7
Kate. Meet Extreme Cheapskate and dumpster diver Kate who takes us through her super cheap lifestyle in New York City. S1, Ep1
Terence/Greg. When penny-pincher Terence is asked to attend a special family dinner, he puts everyone on a strict budget. Plus, Greg puts his cheap skills to the test on a first date. S1, Ep2
Victoria. Victoria refuses to shower at home and lives well under her means. When boyfriend Steve moves in, how will he handle her frugal ways and meals foraged from the wild? S1, Ep3
Abdul & Vickie. Abdul is the ultimate cheapskate, even haggling the price of an anniversary cake. Vicki refuses to buy a TV or clothes for her kids, and uses road kill for gifts. S1, Ep4
Volcano Portal In Mexico. A witch taunts investigators in a graveyard, a woman's late husband checks in on their baby, and an erupting volcano spews paranormal activity. S7, Ep12
The Trunk. Amy Bruni, Adam Berry and Chip Coffey visit a museum in Florida. Reports of multiple attacks on volunteers have sparked the need for a paranormal investigation. S4, Ep3
Dead Men Tell Tales. Amy Bruni, Adam Berry and Chip Coffey investigate a jail in Florida. Rumours suggest murderous spirits are lurking in this property. S4, Ep4

programmes.show_name: The Teen Who Wants A Voice Body Bizarre
programmes.show_description: The Teen Who Wants A Voice. Rebecca vomits up to 12 times an hour and is often hospitalised. Jacque has a lymphatic malformation in her face that means she has never talked. S6, Ep4

programmes.show_name: Boy With No Jaw: Body Bizarre
programmes.show_description: Boy With No Jaw. Darina was born with a genetic disorder that's left her with a deformed mouth and jaw. Isaiah was born with his organs back to front and no jaw at all. S6, Ep5

Bunny Money. The baggage battlers head to an auction in Denver, where they duel over a zebra rug. They also show an interest in some sealed lots, but will the contents be of value? S3, Ep10
World War Score. The Baggage Battlers are heading to the Normandy where the largest private collection of military artefacts is being put up for sale. What will they manage to buy? S3, Ep11
Bunny Money. The baggage battlers head to an auction in Denver, where they duel over a zebra rug. They also show an interest in some sealed lots, but will the contents be of value? S3, Ep10
World War Score. The Baggage Battlers are heading to the Normandy where the largest private collection of military artefacts is being put up for sale. What will they manage to buy? S3, Ep11
Golden Ticket. The baggage battlers hunt down bargains at an estate auction in Nashville, Tennessee. Will Billy be tempted by a mystery box with the inscription New Orleans, Tahiti? S3, Ep14
Swami Says. The buyers are once again on the road in search of profit, this time at an estate auction in Texas. Unique, high-end merchandise is the order of the day in Austin. S4, Ep1
Inflated Egos. The buyers return to Georgia, but this time take their auction battle out of Atlanta to the city of Commerce. Artefacts and iconic advertising pieces are up for grabs. S4, Ep2
Intergalactic Bounty. An eclectic mix of items calls to the buyers, drawing them back once again to do battle in Nashville. Items include a box full of license plates. S4, Ep3
Steal Drum. The buyers are once again in Nashville, TN. Billy, Mark, Laurence and Sally have returned to Music City Auction for all the great items that always seem to be on offer. S4, Ep4
Monster Money. The buyers are in Hollywood for one of the largest movie monster memorabilia auctions of all time. Items include pieces from Frankenstein and Wolf Man movies. S4, Ep5
3 Million Mile Volvo. Wayne lifts the lid on a Volvo that holds the world record for the highest mileage. Plus, he reverse engineers a gearless transmission for a 1912 Cartercar. S11, Ep5
Shouldn't Be Selling It. At auction, Wayne works with a collector who has last-minute doubts about selling his collection. Plus, Wayne's '30 Ford Model A faces stiff competition. S11, Ep6
10 Million Dollar Fixer Upper. Wayne and the team join a multi-shop mission get a coveted, seven-figure 1937 Bugatti ready for the most prestigious exhibition in the world. S11, Ep7
Twist And Scout. Wayne buys the motorcycle of his dreams, an all-original 1928 Indian Scout 101. Plus, he finds homes for a 1977 Mercedes 450 and an Audi R8. S11, Ep8
Little Red Corvette. Lloyd Carney is an engineer and gear head with an extensive car collection full of classics, but there is something missing. Can Dave and the crew help? S5, Ep12
The Last Mopar. An old client, Vinnie, was blown away by the work Dave and the team did on his Charger. Now he's back for their help building the greatest Mopar on the planet. S5, Ep13
The Kindig Coronet. The '67 Coronet build continues. Vinnie wanted to go all out on this build and Dave has done some of his most innovative design work to date. S5, Ep14
One-of-a-Kind Widebody. Shorty's right-hand man Joe Gomez wants to create a widebody Accord for his wife, who's supported him through his fight with cancer since 2009. S2, Ep7
Caleb's Corvette Part 1. After losing a grandson in a crash, Rick wants to raise money to promote safety. He asks Shorty to build a 1956 Corvette that will be auctioned off. S2, Ep8
Secrets Of Russia's Sub. Jeremy investigates an accident involving a nuclear submarine on a secret mission. Also, scientists investigate ancient human remains in a lake in Finland. S2, Ep7
Mystery Of The Sub Destroyer. Jeremy explores the strange disappearance of an Indonesian submarine. Also, a hoard of riches is found inside the wreck of an 18th-century Dutch vessel. S2, Ep8
Secrets Of Skull Grave. Archaeologists use state-of-the-art digital technology to uncover the mystery behind human skulls from Chile. What happened to these discarded skulls? S1, Ep1
War Of The Ancients. Archaeologists use new digital technology to try and solve the mystery behind an ancient burial ground filled with bones, swords, an axe and more in Germany. S1, Ep2
Beast Of The Bayou. A murderous monster is said to lurk in the swamplands near New Orleans. Phil and Jess investigate the bloodthirsty beast that terrorises the Bayou. S4, Ep5
